headline: Datadog Targets AI Driven Observability And Compliance Focused Growth In Regulated Sectors
summary: Datadog (NasdaqGS:DDOG) has made its MCP Server, which connects real-time observability data to AI agents for automated detection and remediation, generally available. The company also announced plans for a new UK data center aimed at customers in highly regulated industries with strict data residency requirements. For investors watching the AI and cloud tooling space, Datadog sits at the intersection of observability, security, and automation. The general availability of MCP Server ties AI...
